summary: Venue Owner Edit Request Workflow fully tested - all features working. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (edit request CRUD, auth, approval flow). Frontend: All components verified (Owner dashboard with Request Changes button, Edit Request form with gold border highlighting, Change Requests section with status badges, VAM Edit Requests tab, VAM Review page with diff view).

issues: Many 404 errors for venue images - placeholder images not found. This is existing data issue, not new feature bug.

backend_edit_request_create.detail: POST /api/venue-onboarding/edit-request creates pending request with changes diff

backend_edit_request_validation.detail: Missing venue_id (400), missing changes (400), no actual changes (400/409) correctly rejected

backend_vam_get_all.detail: GET /api/venue-onboarding/edit-requests/all returns all edit requests (VAM only)

backend_vam_review_approve.detail: PATCH /api/venue-onboarding/edit-request/{id}/review with action=approve updates status and applies changes to venue

backend_auth_checks.detail: VAM cannot create edit requests (403), Owner cannot review (403), unauthenticated blocked (401/403)

frontend_owner_login.detail: venue@venuloq.in/venue123 logs in and redirects to /team/dashboard

frontend_owner_dashboard.detail: Partner Console shows 79 venues with stats, Request Changes button on approved venues

frontend_request_changes_button.detail: data-testid='request-changes-{venueId}' present on approved venues, navigates to /team/venue-owner/edit-request/{venueId}

frontend_edit_request_form.detail: Form shows pre-filled fields, gold border on changed fields, 'Changed' badge, reason field, submit button enables on change

frontend_change_requests_section.detail: data-testid='edit-requests-section' shows owner's requests with Pending/Approved/Rejected badges

frontend_vam_login.detail: vam@venuloq.in/vam123 logs in and redirects to /team/dashboard

frontend_vam_dashboard_edit_requests_tab.detail: Edit Requests tab visible with count, shows Owner Edit Requests list

frontend_vam_edit_request_review.detail: Review page shows venue name, status badge, submitter, reason, diff view (CURRENT red vs PROPOSED green), reviewer notes on reviewed requests

frontend_diff_view.detail: Color-coded diff showing old (red/pink) and new (green) values side by side

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and reviewed edit requests during testing (TEST_* prefixed). Two edit requests exist: 'The Oberoi New Delhi' (rejected), 'The Imperial New Delhi' (approved with description change applied).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Venue Edit Request workflow fully implemented. Key routes: /team/venue-owner/edit-request/:venueId (owner form), /team/vam/edit-request/:editRequestId (VAM review). Key data-testid attributes: edit-request-page, field-{fieldname}, edit-request-reason, edit-request-submit-btn, request-changes-{venueId}, edit-requests-section, vam-edit-request-review, changes-diff, vam-er-approve-btn, vam-er-reject-btn, vam-er-notes, er-{edit_request_id}. VAM dashboard has 'Edit Requests' tab (vam-stat-edit_requests) showing pending count. Changes are stored as {old, new} diff in venue_edit_requests collection.
